sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Yu Yong, Genelux SVP, sells $2192 in GNLX stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Yu Yong, SVP of Clinical Development at Genelux Corp (NASDAQ:GNLX), sold 906 shares for $2.42 each, totaling $2192, to cover taxes on restricted stock units. This transaction occurred amidst a 39% year-to-date decline in GNLX shares, which are near their 52-week low. The company, with a market cap of $117.59 million, has a "WEAK" financial health score and is burning cash quickly.

feed.title: Upstream Bio (NASDAQ: UPB) establishes $150M at-the-market stock program
feed.summary: Upstream Bio (NASDAQ: UPB) has established an at-the-market (ATM) equity program, allowing it to offer and sell up to $150 million worth of its common stock through Leerink Partners LLC. This program provides the company with flexible access to capital, enabling sales of shares over time based on market conditions. Leerink Partners will receive a commission of up to 3.0% of the gross proceeds from these sales, and neither party is obligated to sell a minimum amount of shares.

feed.title: [ARS] ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an SEC filing (Form ARS) by Essex Property Trust, Inc. (ESS) on March 27, 2026. The filing has a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides a company overview including its market cap, industry, and recent news and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper declares JDE Peet's takeover offer unconditional
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper announced its takeover offer for JDE Peet's N.V. has been declared unconditional after 96.22% of shares were tendered by the March 27, 2026 deadline, representing an aggregate value of €14.86 billion. Settlement is scheduled for April 1, 2026, and a post-closing acceptance period for untendered shares will run from March 30 to April 13, 2026. Keurig Dr Pepper intends to delist JDE Peet's shares from Euronext Amsterdam and initiate statutory buy-out proceedings for remaining shares.

feed.title: Globant calls shareholders to Luxembourg meeting on April 28
feed.summary: Globant (NYSE: GLOB) has announced that its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders will take place on April 28, 2026, at its registered office in Luxembourg. The company has made the convening notice, agenda, proxy form, and other relevant meeting materials available on its investor relations website. This announcement follows a strong operational period for Globant, including robust Q4 2025 financial results and strategic AI-focused partnerships.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy will webcast its first-quarter 2026 call on April 23
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy (NYSE: CNP) announced it will webcast its First Quarter 2026 earnings conference call on April 23, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. Central / 8:00 a.m. Eastern. The company, which serves over 7 million customers and manages substantial assets, expects the call to follow its typical pattern of routine investor communications with potentially modest stock price movements. Investors can access the webcast and replay via the company's official investor website.

feed.title: Confluent (CFLT) taken private by IBM subsidiary; Form 15 filed
feed.summary: Confluent, Inc. (CFLT) has filed a Form 15, certifying the termination of its registration under Section 12(g) and the suspension of its reporting duties following its acquisition. An IBM subsidiary, Corvo Merger Sub, Inc., merged with Confluent on March 17, 2026, converting Confluent into a private corporation. This action ends Confluent's obligation to file periodic reports with the SEC.

feed.title: 5.00% Callable Notes Due 2030 — Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS)
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs is issuing 5.00% callable fixed-rate notes due January 17, 2030, with interest payable semiannually. The company has the option to redeem the notes quarterly starting October 17, 2026, at par plus accrued interest. Investors who commit before the expected April 13, 2026 earnings release may withdraw their orders prior to the trade date.

feed.title: Core & Main names former American Water CEO to board By Investing.com
feed.summary: Core & Main, Inc. has announced the appointment of M. Susan Hardwick, former CEO of American Water Works Company, Inc., to its board of directors and as a member of the talent and compensation committee. This change is effective April 1. Alongside this appointment, Stephen LeClair retired, and James Castellano was named chair of the board, showcasing a significant leadership reshuffle for the specialty distributor.

feed.title: Abbott subsidiary dodges whistleblower claim from fired remote worker
feed.summary: A federal appeals court ruled against a former remote employee of an Abbott subsidiary, Krishnan Ghosh, who claimed he was fired for whistleblowing about alleged anti-kickback violations. The Eighth Circuit Court found that Ghosh did not qualify for protection under Minnesota's whistleblower statute due to limited physical presence, and a choice-of-law clause in his employment agreement prevented a claim under Hawaii law. This decision highlights the complexities of whistleblower protections for remote workers across state lines and the importance of employment contract language.

feed.title: Ross Stores (ROST) dd's DISCOUNTS chief sells 5,506 shares at $213.40
feed.summary: Karen Sykes, President and CMO of dd's DISCOUNTS at Ross Stores (ROST), sold 5,506 shares of the company's common stock at an average price of $213.40 per share. This open-market transaction is described as a routine liquidity event, as Sykes still retains a substantial stake of 104,648 shares after the sale. The filing indicates no derivative activity or special arrangements for this transaction.

feed.title: Delaware First Health and the Centene Foundation Announce Grant Program Open Submission Period
feed.summary: Delaware First Health and the Centene Foundation have announced an open submission period for a grant program aimed at addressing social determinants of health in Delaware. Non-profit, community-based organizations and providers can apply for a share of $500,000 in funding to tackle issues like housing insecurity and transportation accessibility. Applications are due by May 25, 2026, with awards announced in September, and preference will be given to proposals focusing on housing instability or transportation.

feed.title: Gilead: Why The 'Immune System Company' Pivot Is No Longer A Bargain (Downgrade) (GILD)
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences, Inc. has been downgraded to Hold after a significant rally, with its stock now deemed appropriately valued near $138/share. While its HIV franchise remains a core strength and Trodelvy's recent approval aids growth, the company faces challenges from cell therapy headwinds and a reliance on M&A for pipeline diversification, introducing execution and strategic risks. Comprehensive analyses suggest a realistic GILD trading range of $98–$209/share, with growth heavily dependent on future clinical successes.

feed.title: Colgate must face lawsuits over safety of mouth rinse for young children
feed.summary: A federal judge has ruled that Colgate-Palmolive must face two lawsuits alleging its mouth rinse packaging misleads parents about its safety for children under six. The consumers argue that bright packaging and flavors suggest the products are safe despite U.S. health authorities' warnings against fluoride rinses for young children. While a similar toothpaste lawsuit was dismissed, the judge found reasonable consumers might be confused by the mouth rinse labels.

feed.title: -1.82% for Becton Dickinson stock as price nears 52-week low on persistent selling
feed.summary: Becton Dickinson (BDX) stock dropped 1.82%, trading near its 52-week low of $153.76, indicating persistent selling pressure across all timeframes. Momentum indicators confirm a strong bearish trend with the price well below key moving averages. The expected weekly range is $153.50 to $156.80, with a high probability of further downside unless it breaks above $156.80.

feed.title: [ARS] ENTERGY CORP /DE/ SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an SEC ARS filing by Entergy Corp (ETR) on March 27, 2026, at 04:40 PM. The filing is categorized as low impact and neutral sentiment. It also provides an overview of Entergy's stock performance, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Coach Tabby Bag: Tapestry's Iconic Luxury Handbag Driving North American Fashion Demand in 2026
feed.summary: The Coach Tabby Bag, a cornerstone of Tapestry's Coach brand, is a key driver of luxury handbag demand in North America for 2026, appealing to professionals and fashion enthusiasts with its blend of vintage-inspired design and modern functionality. Its sustained popularity and contribution to Coach's revenue highlight Tapestry's successful strategy of leveraging heritage designs and adapting to contemporary trends, making Tapestry Inc. an attractive investment in the growing luxury goods sector. The bag's affordability, American craftsmanship, and strategic marketing contribute to its strong market position and investor appeal.

feed.title: UBS (AMUB) offers autocallable notes tied to ConocoPhillips due Mar 31, 2027
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering $490,000 Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to ConocoPhillips common stock, maturing March 31, 2027. These notes pay periodic contingent coupons if the underlying stock is at or above a coupon barrier on observation dates and can be automatically called early if ConocoPhillips' stock closes at or above the initial level. Investors face significant risks, including potential loss of principal if the notes are not called and the final stock level is below the downside threshold, and credit risk associated with UBS AG.

feed.title: Bill Gates’ 2026 Portfolio: Top 5 Stocks to Buy
feed.summary: This article identifies five top stocks in Bill Gates' 2026 portfolio, focusing on Caterpillar as the fifth pick. Caterpillar is highlighted for its growing involvement in AI and data center power generation, alongside its traditional heavy construction business benefiting from global infrastructure spending. The article also references positive sentiment from the Diamond Hill Large Cap Fund regarding Caterpillar's power-generation business.

feed.title: T-Mobile US Announces Upcoming Board Member Resignation
feed.summary: T-Mobile US announced that director Abdurazak Mudesir will resign from its board and governance committee, effective March 31, 2026. The company clarified that his departure is not due to disagreements over T-Mobile's operations or policies, indicating a routine transition. This move will necessitate adjustments in board composition and oversight responsibilities.

feed.title: UBS (NYSE: AMUB) offers 3-year autocallable notes linked to Alphabet (Class C)
feed.summary: UBS is offering 3-year Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Alphabet Inc. Class C stock (GOOG) with potential for a 9.13% per annum contingent coupon. These notes carry material downside risk, as investors could lose all principal if the underlying asset falls below the downside threshold at maturity and the notes are not autocalled. The offering, with a principal amount of $10 per note and a minimum investment of 100 notes, carries UBS's credit risk and offers limited liquidity due to not being listed on an exchange.

feed.title: Hawaiian Electric (NYSE: HE) returns to profit as wildfire costs drop
feed.summary: Hawaiian Electric Industries (NYSE: HE) reported a return to profitability in 2025, posting a net income of $123.1 million, a significant improvement from a $1.43 billion loss in 2024. This turnaround was primarily driven by a sharp reduction in wildfire-related expenses, which dropped from $1.4 billion in 2024 to $12.2 million in 2025. The company also saw a modest decline in consolidated revenues and maintained a capital structure with elevated leverage due to ongoing wildfire liabilities.

feed.title: [ARS] O REILLY AUTOMOTIVE INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE INC (ORLY) on March 27, 2026, with a neutral filing sentiment and low impact. It provides details about the filing, including its type, company information, acceptance date, and links to view the PDF and original filing on SEC EDGAR. The page also offers an overview of ORLY's stock data, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Golden Sun Technology (GSUN) director Xu Xijing files initial Form 3
feed.summary: Golden Sun Technology Group Ltd. director Xu Xijing has filed an initial statement of beneficial ownership on Form 3, establishing his status as a director. The filing indicates that there are currently no reported transactions or derivative positions associated with this insider. This Form 3 serves to formally record Xu Xijing as an insider director, setting the stage for future disclosures of any changes in beneficial ownership.

feed.title: Golden Sun Technology (GSUN) director Jin Xiao files initial Form 3 ownership
feed.summary: Golden Sun Technology Group Ltd. director Jin Xiao has filed an initial Form 3, an initial statement of beneficial ownership. This filing indicates no reportable transactions or derivative positions, serving as a baseline disclosure of insider holdings at the time Jin Xiao became a reporting person. The document confirms Jin Xiao's role as a director and that no securities were beneficially owned at the time of filing.

feed.title: Hafnia (NYSE: HAFN) retires 12.7M treasury shares after buyback
feed.summary: Hafnia Limited announced the cancellation of 12,681,253 shares repurchased through a previous buyback program, along with an additional 40,000 treasury shares. This action reduces the total number of issued shares to 499,842,279, with 60,974 shares remaining in treasury. The cancellation permanently retires the repurchased shares, decreasing the number of outstanding shares available to investors.

feed.title: O’Reilly Automotive (ORLY) outlines 2026 proxy votes, 2025 growth and political spending proposal
feed.summary: O'Reilly Automotive has released its 2026 proxy statement, announcing its virtual-only Annual Meeting for May 14, 2026. Shareholders will vote on director elections, an advisory Say-on-Pay proposal, auditor ratification, and a shareholder proposal regarding political spending disclosure, which the Board recommends against. The proxy highlights strong 2025 financial performance, including a 15-for-1 stock split, significant sales growth, operating cash flow, and share repurchases, underscoring the company's commitment to shareholder value and its "promote from within" philosophy.

feed.title: BlackRock (BLK) posts record flows, $14T AUM and nominates 19 directors
feed.summary: BlackRock (BLK) reported record client flows of $698 billion and an all-time high of $14 trillion in Assets Under Management (AUM) for 2025, alongside strong revenue and operating income growth. The company has filed a preliminary Proxy Statement for its May 20, 2026, Annual Meeting, proposing the election of 19 director nominees and the ratification of Deloitte as its auditor. Shareholders will also vote on amending a subsidiary's certificate of incorporation to remove a pass-through voting provision, a move aimed at enhancing corporate flexibility.

feed.title: What Lies Ahead for ExxonMobil Amid Surging Crude Prices?
feed.summary: ExxonMobil (XOM) is poised to benefit from surging crude prices driven by Middle East geopolitical tensions, further strengthening its financial outlook. The company plans to expand upstream production from low-cost assets in Guyana and Permian, aiming for significant output increases by 2030, while maintaining a strong balance sheet. Other industry players like ConocoPhillips (COP) and EOG Resources (EOG) also boast low-cost production profiles that enable profitability in volatile markets.

feed.title: Omnicom (OMC) Co-President Daryl Simm granted 59,415 restricted stock units
feed.summary: Omnicom (OMC) Co-President and Co-COO Daryl Simm was granted 59,415 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 25, 2026, as part of his equity-based compensation. These RSUs will vest in three equal annual installments starting May 15, 2027. Following this award, Simm directly holds 226,698 shares of Omnicom common stock.

feed.title: Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) CFO granted 52,810 restricted stock units
feed.summary: Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) CFO Philip J. Angelastro has been granted 52,810 restricted stock units, payable solely in common stock. These units will vest over five years, with 20% vesting annually starting May 15, 2027. Following this grant, Angelastro directly holds 522,976 shares and indirectly holds 1,770 shares through a 401(k) plan.

feed.title: Golden Sun (GSUN) director Ji Peilin details direct and indirect stakes
feed.summary: Golden Sun Technology Group Ltd. director Ji Peilin has reported initial holdings of Class A ordinary shares. The Form 3 filing indicates indirect beneficial ownership of 140,108 shares through Well Joy International Investment Limited, for which Ji is the sole shareholder, and a direct ownership of 52,113 shares. This report details the structure of Ji Peilin's beneficial ownership in GSUN.

feed.title: Fertitta entities sell call options on 300,000 WYNN shares (NASDAQ: WYNN)
feed.summary: Entities associated with Tilman J. Fertitta, a major shareholder in Wynn Resorts (WYNN), sold call options on 300,000 shares of WYNN common stock at a price of $4.2489 per option. The call options have a strike price of $120.00 and an expiration date of October 2, 2026. This transaction is an open-market sale of a derivative, not a direct sale of shares, and leaves 300,000 call options of this series held by Hospitality Headquarters, Inc.

feed.title: Earnings Season Anticipation: HPE Faces Market Volatility
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) is preparing to release its quarterly earnings report amid concerns about market volatility, rising oil prices, and geopolitical tensions. Despite a robust gross margin, the company faces profitability challenges and its stock has been trading down due to export restrictions. Analysts currently have a neutral sentiment, noting potential undervaluation but also highlighting the need for strategic adjustments to boost shareholder value.

feed.title: Generation Income Properties (GIPR) ends strategic review and opts to remain independent
feed.summary: Generation Income Properties (GIPR) has concluded its strategic alternatives review, with its independent special committee recommending that the company continue operating as an independent public entity. The board has accepted this recommendation, focusing on managing its portfolio to address near-term debt and preferred equity maturities, while remaining open to future inbound transaction interests. An amended 8-K filing clarified that the special committee's recommendation was not "unanimous," though the core decision to remain independent holds.

feed.title: John Deere, Tarter USA partnership will launch flex wing rotary cutter production in Liberty
feed.summary: John Deere and Tarter USA have announced a strategic manufacturing partnership to produce a new line of American-made Frontier Flex Wing Rotary Cutters in Liberty, Kentucky. This collaboration has already exceeded initial sales forecasts, signaling strong demand and creating 26 new jobs. The partnership leverages Tarter USA's advanced production facility and John Deere's customer insight to deliver innovative agricultural equipment.

feed.title: AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) Hits New 1-Year Low - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) reached a new 52-week low of $160.43, trading below its 50- and 200-day moving averages, despite a recent dividend increase to $1.78 quarterly for a 4.4% yield. Analysts currently hold a "Hold" rating for the stock with a consensus target price of $198.44. The company reported a modest beat in its last quarterly earnings with $2.85 EPS and $767.9M revenue, maintaining a market cap of $22.54 billion and significant institutional ownership.

feed.title: Domino's Cost Edge and Digital Prowess Should Drive Continued Pizza Market Share Gains
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza is poised to gain market share due to its value-oriented menu, bolstered by technology, convenience, and continuous innovation. The company's strong international franchisee base and marketing efforts have already driven significant sales growth, outpacing the broader global foodservice industry. Analysts anticipate continued system growth for Domino's, projecting 6.1% over the next five years compared to 4.5% for the industry.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley enters bitcoin ETF race with market-leading low fee
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley plans to launch a spot Bitcoin ETF with a fee of 14 basis points, making it the lowest-cost option on the market if approved. This strategic move could ignite a fee war and attract significant assets due to the bank's extensive wealth management network. Given that spot Bitcoin ETFs offer similar exposure, the lower fee could prompt financial advisors to shift client funds from higher-cost competitors.

feed.title: Elevance Health (NYSE: ELV) 2026 proxy outlines 2025 growth, pay and ESG
feed.summary: Elevance Health's 2026 proxy statement details robust 2025 financial performance, including $197.6 billion in operating revenue and $6.8 billion in adjusted net income, alongside returning $4.1 billion to shareholders. The company emphasizes its whole health strategy, strong governance with independent board oversight, and commitments to ESG initiatives, including AI governance, fair pay, and environmental sustainability. Shareholders will vote on director elections, executive compensation, auditor ratification, and a proposal regarding corporate political contributions at the virtual annual meeting on May 13, 2026.

feed.title: Hafnia cuts share count to 499.8M after cancelling 12.7M shares
feed.summary: Hafnia Limited announced the cancellation of 12,681,253 shares repurchased through a share buyback program, along with an additional 40,000 treasury shares. This action reduces the total number of issued shares to 499,842,279, with 60,974 shares remaining in treasury. The company, a leading tanker owner, finalized its buyback program, signifying a reduction in its outstanding share count.

feed.title: Assessing Genius Sports (GENI) Valuation As Moment Engine Expansion Broadens Programmatic Ad Reach
feed.summary: Genius Sports (GENI) has expanded its Moment Engine, covering approximately 90% of the programmatic ad market and establishing new partnerships, yet its recent stock performance has been weak. Despite a narrative suggesting it is 62.5% undervalued at $4.41 against a fair value of $11.76, driven by growth in interactive sports content, a P/S ratio of 1.6x compared to a peer average of 1.1x indicates potential valuation risk. Investors are advised to consider both the potential upside and warning signs before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Free cash flow per share of Global Net Lease Inc – LSE:0IW3
feed.summary: The article focuses on the free cash flow per share of Global Net Lease Inc, traded on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker 0IW3. It appears to be a financial data page from TradingView, indicating that the market is closed without any trades for the specified stock.

feed.title: [ARS] GENERAL DYNAMICS CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on a recent ARS filing by General Dynamics Corp (GD) with the SEC. The filing has a low impact and neutral sentiment, indicating it's a routine disclosure. This financial news platform also provides an overview of GD's stock performance, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: CFO Jeremy Barnum gains JPMorgan (JPM) stock from PSU vesting and tax withholding
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.'s CFO, Jeremy Barnum, received 38,629 shares of JPM common stock from a Performance Share Unit (PSU) award that settled on March 25, 2026, after a three-year performance period. A portion of these shares, specifically 21,362, was withheld at $295.04 per share to cover tax obligations. Following these transactions, Barnum directly holds 41,071 shares of JPM common stock, with the delivered shares subject to an additional two-year holding period.

feed.title: JPMorgan (NYSE: JPM) general counsel settles PSU award into stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.'s General Counsel, Stacey Friedman, exercised performance share units, converting them into 48,929 shares of common stock. A portion of these shares was withheld for tax purposes, leaving her with a direct holding of 72,007 common shares. These shares are subject to an additional two-year holding period, making the total vesting and holding period five years from the January 2023 grant date.

feed.title: Broadcom’s Expertise In SerDes And DSP Drives Success In An AI World (NASDAQ:AVGO)
feed.summary: Broadcom is leveraging its expertise in SerDes and DSP to dominate high-speed AI chip interconnects and custom accelerator co-designs, leading to significant AI-driven revenue growth. Despite strong technical moats and a projected three-year revenue CAGR of 36%, valuation concerns arise from potential overinvestment in AI, customer shifts (like Google’s engagement with MediaTek), and stock-based compensation dilution. With a market cap near $1.51 trillion and 43% FCF margins, the stock is rated a Hold, as much of its AI upside appears to be priced in.

feed.title: Greenland Technologies (NASDAQ: GTEC) files $200M shelf registration
feed.summary: Greenland Technologies (NASDAQ: GTEC) has filed a shelf registration to offer up to $200 million in various securities, including Class A ordinary shares, preferred shares, debt securities, warrants, rights, and units. The filing allows for flexible future capital raising but does not mandate immediate issuance, with specific terms for each offering to be detailed in prospectus supplements. The company highlights operational and regulatory risks related to its PRC subsidiaries, including CSRC filing requirements and potential delisting under the HFCA Act, and notes a suspension of HEVI’s operations in 2025 due to tariff policy uncertainty.

feed.title: Gen Digital (NASDAQ: GEN) extends key credit facilities to 2031
feed.summary: Gen Digital Inc. has extended its revolving credit facility to March 27, 2031, and refinanced its Initial Tranche A Term Loans into new Extended Term A Loans totaling $2,741 million. This amendment to its credit agreement adjusts interest rates based on debt rating and total leverage ratio, and the Extended Term A Loans will amortize at 5% annually, solidifying its financial structure for the coming years.

feed.title: T-Mobile board member Mudesir to resign March 31
feed.summary: T-Mobile US Inc. announced that board member Abdurazak Mudesir will resign from the company's board of directors, effective March 31, 2026. Mudesir's decision to step down from both the board and the Nominating, Corporate Governance and Compliance Committee was communicated on March 26, 2026. The company clarified that his resignation is not due to any disagreements regarding T-Mobile's operations, policies, or practices.
